{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Customer Service Agent (Real Estate)",
  "description": "Outsource Nigeria is a full-service Human Resources agency, specializing in providing outsourced turnkey manpower solutions to growing companies. Our solution include HR Services, Recruiting, Accounting, IT Support, Business Intelligence, Developers, and Operations including management and field / phone / automated based resources. The core of Outsource Nigeria&rsquo;s success is its people.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Service Agent (Real Estate)
Job Location: Lekki Aviation Town, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time (Fully Onsite)

Job Summary


	The Customer Service Agent will qualify inbound and outbound leads, schedule appointments, nurture prospects, and support the sales funnel process


Key Responsibilities


	Respond to inbound inquiries promptly and update the fresh sales
	Conduct outbound lead follow-up campaigns and update the CRM.
	Qualify prospects based on set criteria to the pipeline.
	Schedule meetings for sales closers and update the CRM/Sheet
	Update CRM daily with lead status.
	Support WhatsApp, phone, and email communication.
	Maintain high lead engagement rates.
	Make outbound calls to prospective customers to introduce company products and services.
	Follow up on inbound leads, inquiries, and customer requests.
	Qualify leads and schedule appointments for the sales team.
	Maintain and update customer records in CRM systems.
	Handle customer inquiries professionally and provide accurate product/service information.
	Achieve daily, weekly, and monthly call and conversion targets.
	Build rapport with customers and nurture leads through regular follow-up.
	Escalate customer concerns or complex issues to the appropriate department.
	Prepare daily and weekly activity/performance reports.


KPIs


	Lead Qualification Rate
	Appointment Booking Rate
	Response Time
	Call Conversion Ratio
	CRM Accuracy


Requirements


	Minimum of HND/B.Sc. in any discipline.
	1&ndash;2 years in call centre, customer service or inside sales.
	Excellent communication skills.
	Experience in telesales or customer engagement.
	Familiarity with CRM platforms and lead management.
	Strong phone presence and CRM proficiency;
	Comfortable with multi-timezone communication.
	Objection handling ability
	Excellent verbal communication and persuasion skills.
	Strong listening and objection-handling abilities.
	Ability to work under pressure and meet performance targets.
	Basic computer literacy and familiarity with CRM tools is an advantage.


Core Competencies:


	Communication and interpersonal skills
	Sales and negotiation skills
	Customer relationship management
	Time management
	Problem-solving abilities
	Attention to detail.


Salary &amp; Benefits


	Salary: 280,000 / month
	Performance-based incentives and bonuses
	HMO/Medical Insurance
	Training and career development opportunities
	Commission and performance bonuses.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: jobs@outsourcenigeria.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

  "validThrough": "2026-08-01",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

    "@type": "Organization",

  },

      "@type": "PostalAddress",

    }
  },

    "@type": "MonetaryAmount",

    "value": {
      "@type": "QuantitativeValue",
      "minValue": 250000,
      "maxValue": 400000,
      "unitText": "MONTH"
    }
  }
}



Customer Service Agent (Real Estate) Job at Outsource Nigeria




        
    

        
        Outsource Nigeria is a full-service Human Resources agency, specializing in providing outsourced turnkey manpower solutions to growing companies. Our solution include HR Services, Recruiting, Accounting, IT Support, Business Intelligence, Developers, and Operations including management and field / phone / automated based resources. The core of Outsource Nigeria’s success is its people.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Service Agent (Real Estate)
Job Location: Lekki Aviation Town, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time (Fully Onsite)

Job Summary
     

            
    




	The Customer Service Agent will qualify inbound and outbound leads, schedule appointments, nurture prospects, and support the sales funnel process


Key Responsibilities


	Respond to inbound inquiries promptly and update the fresh sales
	Conduct outbound lead follow-up campaigns and update the CRM.
	Qualify prospects based on set criteria to the pipeline.
	Schedule meetings for sales closers and update the CRM/Sheet
	Update CRM daily with lead status.
	Support WhatsApp, phone, and email communication.
	Maintain high lead engagement rates.
	Make outbound calls to prospective customers to introduce company products and services.
	Follow up on inbound leads, inquiries, and customer requests.
	Qualify leads and schedule appointments for the sales team.
	Maintain and update customer records in CRM systems.
	Handle customer inquiries professionally and provide accurate product/service information.
	Achieve daily, weekly, and monthly call and conversion targets.
	Build rapport with customers and nurture leads through regular follow-up.
	Escalate customer concerns or complex issues to the appropriate department.
	Prepare daily and weekly activity/performance reports.


KPIs


	Lead Qualification Rate
	Appointment Booking Rate
	Response Time
	Call Conversion Ratio
	CRM Accuracy


Requirements


	Minimum of HND/B.Sc. in any discipline.
	1–2 years in call centre, customer service or inside sales.
	Excellent communication skills.
	Experience in telesales or customer engagement.
	Familiarity with CRM platforms and lead management.
	Strong phone presence and CRM proficiency;
	Comfortable with multi-timezone communication.
	Objection handling ability
	Excellent verbal communication and persuasion skills.
	Strong listening and objection-handling abilities.
	Ability to work under pressure and meet performance targets.
	Basic computer literacy and familiarity with CRM tools is an advantage.


Core Competencies:


	Communication and interpersonal skills
	Sales and negotiation skills
	Customer relationship management
	Time management
	Problem-solving abilities
	Attention to detail.


Salary & Benefits


	Salary: 280,000 / month
	Performance-based incentives and bonuses
	HMO/Medical Insurance
	Training and career development opportunities
	Commission and performance bonuses.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

                        Customer Service Representative Job at Koye's Burger
                        Reservations & Ticketing Officer Job at TeamAce Limited

The company is driven by outstanding professionals who are examples of the phenomenal Nigerian spirit and who consistently execute projects with innovativeness, passion and speed.

Our company&rsquo;s focus is engineering and construction of offshore pipelines, floating and fixed facilities and subsea production systems. The company works with international partners to bring the best in engineering and construction to Nigeria and to take the best of Nigerian engineering to the rest of the world.

Currently, the company represents the following OEM&#39;S In Nigeria as their Official Distributors, they are Parker Hannifin, Vishal Steel Nigeria, POK, Corderie dor and Stracau Valves.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Location: Lagos
Job type: Full time

Requirements


	Candidates should possess relevant qualifications with 12+ years of working experience.&nbsp;


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Resume to: hr@offshoredimensions.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Lead Pipeline Engineer Job at Offshore Dimensions Limited




        
    

        
        
     

            
    

Offshore Dimensions Limited is a Nigerian EPC company that is committed to building engineering and construction capabilities in Nigeria. The company is driven by outstanding professionals who are examples of the phenomenal Nigerian spirit and who consistently execute projects with innovativeness, passion and speed.

Our company’s focus is engineering and construction of offshore pipelines, floating and fixed facilities and subsea production systems. The company works with international partners to bring the best in engineering and construction to Nigeria and to take the best of Nigerian engineering to the rest of the world.

Currently, the company represents the following OEM'S In Nigeria as their Official Distributors, they are Parker Hannifin, Vishal Steel Nigeria, POK, Corderie dor and Stracau Valves.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Lead Pipeline Engineer

Job Location: Lagos
Job type: Full time

Requirements


	Candidates should possess relevant qualifications with 12+ years of working experience. 


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Resume to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the    

    

        Click here to Apply

Procurement / Materials Coordinator Job at Offshore Dimensions Limited




        
    

        
        
     

            
    

Offshore Dimensions Limited is a Nigerian EPC company that is committed to building engineering and construction capabilities in Nigeria. The company is driven by outstanding professionals who are examples of the phenomenal Nigerian spirit and who consistently execute projects with innovativeness, passion and speed.

Our company’s focus is engineering and construction of offshore pipelines, floating and fixed facilities and subsea production systems. The company works with international partners to bring the best in engineering and construction to Nigeria and to take the best of Nigerian engineering to the rest of the world.

Currently, the company represents the following OEM'S In Nigeria as their Official Distributors, they are Parker Hannifin, Vishal Steel Nigeria, POK, Corderie dor and Stracau Valves.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Procurement / Materials Coordinator

Job Location: Lagos
Job type: Full time

Requirements


	Candidates should possess relevant qualifications with 5+ year of working experience. 


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Resume to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the

title: Job Openings at Ewa Consulting Firm
content:
Ewa Consulting Firm is a dynamic and results-driven consultancy dedicated to providing tailored solutions in business strategy, human resources, and organizational development. With a client-centric approach, we partner with individuals, startups, and established businesses to optimize operations, drive growth, and enhance performance. Our team of experienced consultants brings industry expertise and innovative thinking to help our clients navigate challenges and seize new opportunities in an ever-evolving market.

We are recruiting to fill the following positions below:

1.) Field Sales Representative / Marketer
     

            
    



Job Locations: Suleja, Maraba, Gwagwalada, Kuje, Kabusa, Gariki, Dutse - Abuja (FCT) 
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	We are looking for energetic and result-driven Field Sales Representatives to market and sell our range of electrical wires, lighting products, bathroom and sanitary fittings and other electrical products across the listed locations in Abuja. (Suleja, Maraba, Gwagwalada, Kuje, Kabusa, Gariki, Dutse).


Responsibilities


	Identify and engage potential customers within assigned axis/territory.
	Promote and sell electrical wires, lighting products, bathroom fittings and other electrical products.
	Build and maintain strong relationships with clients, distributors and retailers.
	Achieve and exceed assigned sales targets.
	Provide market feedback and competitor insights to management.
	Maintain accurate records of sales activities and customer interactions.


Requirements


	2–3 years of experience in marketing or sales.
	A graduate is an added advantage.
	Good appearance and confident communication skills.
	Strong numerical/calculation skills.
	Smart, proactive and target-driven personality.
	Must be willing to work within the specified axis.


Salary


	N142,000 - N150,000 / month.
	Salary is negotiable based on experience and proven sales ability +Commission


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using "Application – Field Sales Representative" as the subject of the email.

 

 

2.) Production Manager

Job Location: Idu, Abuja (FCT) 

Responsibilties


	Oversee the daily production process to ensure smooth and efficient operations.
	Supervise factory workers and ensure tasks are properly assigned and completed.
	Monitor production quality and ensure company standards are maintained.
	Ensure proper use of materials, equipment and production resources.
	Track production output and report daily activities to management.
	Promote discipline, safety and orderliness within the production area.


Requirements


	Must be a graduate.
	Must have experience in staff management.
	Must have basic computer knowledge.
	Previous experience in a manufacturing environment is an added advantage.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using "Application for Production Manager" as the subject of the email.

 

 

3.) HR Assistant

Job Location: Idu, Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities


	Support end-to-end recruitment activities, including job postings, CV screening, interview coordination and candidate communication.
	Assist with onboarding and orientation of new employees across various business units.
	Maintain accurate employee records, HR files, attendance reports and other confidential documents.
	Support payroll preparation by collating attendance, leave, and employee-related updates.
	Assist in implementing HR policies, procedures and workplace compliance requirements.
	Provide administrative support for employee relations, performance tracking and disciplinary processes.
	Coordinate staff welfare activities, training schedules and internal HR communications.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in Human Resources, Business Administration, Psychology, Industrial Relations, or a related field.
	1–3 years of HR experience, especially in recruitment.
	Good knowledge of Nigerian labour laws and HR best practices.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office and basic HR systems.
	CIPM, SHRM, PHRi, or any related HR certification is an added advantage.
	Previous experience supporting hospitality, service, or blue-collar workforces is preferred.
	Strong communication, organization and interpersonal skills.


Remuneration


	Salary: N120,000 - N150,000 monthly.
	Accommodation would be provided.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and Cover Letter to: [email protected] using to: "Application – HR Assistant" as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply
